data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Amazon has measures in place to protect against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates AWS Shield and Advanced Network Security solutions.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Sensitive data is encrypted both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS/SSL for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
data.description: Amazon uses robust IAM policies to control access to resources.
data.technical_spec: Empowers administrators to manage AWS services and resources securely.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Amazon conducts regular security audits to ensure compliance and detect vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Employs both internal and third-party audits to maintain high security standards.

data.title: Automated Threat Detection
data.description: Uses advanced machine learning to detect and respond to potential threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates AWS GuardDuty for continuous monitoring and threat detection.
